title: Neko Health - AI-Powered Preventive Body Scanning
problem: Traditional preventive health screenings are time-consuming, expensive, and often miss early warning signs. Healthcare is reactive rather than proactive.
solution: Full-body scanning technology using AI, lasers, and sensors to detect skin conditions, cardiovascular markers, and other health indicators in a single 30-minute session.
technology: Computer vision, AI diagnostics, laser scanning, sensor arrays
traction_signals: Founded by Daniel Ek (Spotify founder) and Hjalmar Nilsonne (2018)
regulatory_notes: Operates as health clinic in Sweden. AI diagnostic tools require medical device certification.
varden_fit: Low — consumer-facing preventive screening, requires physical infrastructure. Technology approach interesting but not directly applicable to Varden's B2B marketplace.
notes: Premium consumer model. Could inspire Varden partners to offer similar preventive services through marketplace.
